title: Greece extends drug reimbursement rule, despite delayed medicine access concerns [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Patient groups warn new criteria could further slow access to rare disease and orphan therapies already reaching Greece years after EU approval
summary_public: Patient groups warn new criteria could further slow access to rare disease and orphan therapies already reaching Greece years after EU approval

GR.label: negative
GR.evidence: new criteria could further slow access to rare disease therapies
